name: device-knowledge-workspace
description: Open device knowledge modules and MCP server for robotics agents.

scripts.verify: npm run lint:docs && npm run test -w @device-knowledge/core && npm run test:adapter && npm run test -w @device-knowledge/rdk-knowledge && npm run test -w @device-knowledge/jetson-knowledge && npm run test -w @device-knowledge/rpi-knowledge && npm run test -w @device-knowledge/rk-knowledge && npm run test:artifact && npm run lint:knowledge
scripts.build:rdk-artifact: npm run build -w @device-knowledge/core && npm run build -w @device-knowledge/rdk-knowledge && npm run build -w @device-knowledge/jetson-knowledge && npm run build -w @device-knowledge/rpi-knowledge && npm run build -w @device-knowledge/rk-knowledge && node scripts/build-rdk-artifact.mjs
scripts.test:adapter: npm run build:dmoss-core && npm run test -w @device-knowledge/dmoss-adapter
